{{Quote|'''Hydra-craft!''' Don't know what they're '''called''' here... but they're skimming over the '''water''' just like I used to whip around Tatooine in my old landspeeder!|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 12">[[Star Wars (1977) 12|''Star Wars'' (1977) 12]]</ref>}}
A '''Hydra craft''' was a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used for transportation over [[Water/Legends|water]]. This was the primary mode of transportation on [[Drexel/Legends|Drexel]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Hydraskimmer.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A hydra-skimmer version.]]
The hydra craft was a small aquatic [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]]. The craft was typically equipped with [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and [[magnetic grapple]]s. An armored type of Hydra craft was called a '''hydra-skimmer'''.

==History==
They were used by the [[ship-dweller]]s to salvage wrecked ships and fight [[Dragon Lords]]. During the [[Battle of Drexel]], hydra-skimmers were used as gun platforms, both against the dragons, as well as against the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].
